craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Sunset Views Daily – Elegant Villas on the Water 917 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach, FL 33572 Discover unbelievable waterfront living at Pilar’s Harbour. Dock your boat in one of our 5 boat slips or look out your double French doors and watch manatees and dolphins swimming in our saltwater canals. Either way, your Florida lifestyle living is just around the bend. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our villas include updated kitchens, gorgeous open spaces, and energy-efficient features. Our 2-bedroom/2-bathroom with separate den waterfront villas have huge patio areas, the master bathroom includes double sinks, soaker tubs with a separate enclosed shower, and a 2-car garage with every apartment. Our 2-bedroom/1-bathroom villas include 2 private covered parking spaces. Come to Riverview and Apollo Beach’s best-kept secret, Pilar’s Harbour Apartments; now is the time to Stop Looking and Start Living a waterfront lifestyle. Apartment Features: Modern Kitchen Granite Countertops Stainless Steel Dishwasher Extended Countertop Built-in Microwave Pantry / Storage Washer and Dryer Den / Home Office Hardwood Floors in select Villas Huge Walk-In Closets Tons of Storage Luxury Tub & Glass Enclosed Shower Double Sink Ceiling Fans Throughout Community Features: Breakfast Bar Double Sinks Granite Countertops Stainless Steel Appliances Refrigerator with Ice Maker Dishwasher Microwave Large Closet Air Conditioning In-Unit Laundry Open-Concept Spacious Floorplans Views Ceiling Fan Private Balcony Cable Ready Pet Friendly Close to Shopping Close to Restaurants Corporate Housing Available Close to Schools Online Payments Available On-Site Maintenance On-Site Management Online Service Requests Unique Villa Style Community 2 Stunning Swimming Pools Fire Pits Boat Slips Rentals Canal Access Stunning Water Views Large Private Patio Garage or Covered ParkingIncluded with each Villa Beautiful Landscaping Pet Friendly* Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://liveinsula.com/xkkr7rqb/pilar-s-harbour-apartments *The rental amount shown includes only the monthly apartment rental rate. Additional monthly charges may apply and will be outlined in the Lease Agreement for your review before signing. For details about any additional charges, please contact our leasing office. 🌴 Welcome to Stress-Free Living at Pilar’s Harbour 🌴Ready to simplify your life and finally enjoy it?At Pilar’s Harbour, you can leave the maintenance, yard work, and headaches behind… and step into a lifestyle designed for comfort, peace, and ease. ✨ What You’ll Love:✔️ Spacious 1 & 2 Bedroom Homes✔️ Washer & Dryer Included✔️ Beautiful Water Views Available 🌅✔️ Private Garages (select homes) 🚗✔️ Quiet, Welcoming Community✔️ Professional Maintenance Team – We Handle It All!💙 This is more than an apartment… it’s a lifestyle upgrade.Imagine mornings with coffee overlooking the water, afternoons without chores, and evenings enjoying your peaceful surroundings.📍 Pilar’s Harbour Apartments📞 Call or Text TODAY: show contact info

APPLY NOW 917 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach, FL 33572 Discover unbelievable waterfront living at Pilar’s Harbour. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our 2-bedroom/1-bathroom villas include 2 private covered parking spaces. Come to Riverview and Apollo Beach’s best-kept secret, Pilar’s Harbour Apartments; now is the time to Stop Looking and Start Living a waterfront lifestyle. craigslist.title: Single Family Residence
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Enjoy spectacular water views in this well-maintained home in the Gated community of Hunter's Green. Two bedroom, two bath, with an office that could be a third bedroom. The home features an updated kitchen with granite counters, soft close cabinets and Stainless Steel appliances, an updated primary bathroom, 2 car garage, freshly painted with tile and wood plank floors. The sliding doors open to your screened patio that overlooks a beautiful lake and Flatwoods Park. The home has high ceilings and an open floor plan. The Esprit HOA covers weekly lawn service. Hunter's Green is highly sought after with 24-hour staffed gated entrance, a neighborhood park, playground, picnic area, tennis courts, volleyball, baseball & soccer fields, Private Country Club with a golf course, tennis, fitness center, and swimming pool with membership, and more! This New Tampa location is convenient to I-75, good schools, restaurants, shopping (including the Shops at Wiregrass and the Tampa Premium Outlets), USF, hospitals, VA, trails at Flatwoods Park, public library, and all the amenities of New Tampa.

craigslist.title: Hermoso apartamento renovado.
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Hola, Se renta este hermoso apartamento de 1 cuarto, Sala comedor, Cocina y bańo todo independiente en Holiday Fl. Los servicios como Agua, Electricidad, Wifi y basura estan incluidos. La entrada es independiente, pequeńa terraza y parqueo para vehiculo. Tiene agua fria y caliente en todo momento. El apartamento esta completamente remodelado. La cocina tiene gabinetes, nuevo microonda, nueva stufa, nueva meseta, nuevo fregadero, llave de agua y piso de losas nuevo. La renta es $800.00 para una persona o dos personas adultas $800.00 mas deposito de la misma cantidad correspondiente. No fumadores, no droga, no musica alta, no fiestas, no mascotas. Solo personas tranquilas. Se hara chequeo de credito, antecedentes penales y desalojo a traves de una aplicacion. El area es muy traquila donde reina la paz. Interesados contartarme.

Dock your boat in one of our 5 boat slips or look out your double French doors and watch manatees and dolphins swimming in our saltwater canals. Either way, your Florida lifestyle living is just around the bend. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our villas include updated kitchens, gorgeous open spaces, and energy-efficient features. Our 2-bedroom/2-bathroom with separate den waterfront villas have huge patio areas, the master bathroom includes double sinks, soaker tubs with a separate enclosed shower, and a 2-car garage with every apartment. Our 2-bedroom/1-bathroom villas include 2 private covered parking spaces. Come to Riverview and Apollo Beach’s best-kept secret, Pilar’s Harbour Apartments; now is the time to Stop Looking and Start Living a waterfront lifestyle. Apartment Features: Modern Kitchen Granite Countertops Stainless Steel Dishwasher Extended Countertop Built-in Microwave Pantry / Storage Washer and Dryer Den / Home Office Hardwood Floors in select Villas Huge Walk-In Closets Tons of Storage Luxury Tub & Glass Enclosed Shower Double Sink Ceiling Fans Throughout Community Features: Breakfast Bar Double Sinks Granite Countertops Stainless Steel Appliances Refrigerator with Ice Maker Dishwasher Microwave Large Closet Air Conditioning In-Unit Laundry Open-Concept Spacious Floorplans Views Ceiling Fan Private Balcony Cable Ready Pet Friendly Close to Shopping Close to Restaurants Corporate Housing Available Close to Schools Online Payments Available On-Site Maintenance On-Site Management Online Service Requests Unique Villa Style Community 2 Stunning Swimming Pools Fire Pits Boat Slips Rentals Canal Access Stunning Water Views Large Private Patio Garage or Covered ParkingIncluded with each Villa Beautiful Landscaping Pet Friendly* Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://liveinsula.com/2qj47tln/pilar-s-harbour-apartments *The rental amount shown includes only the monthly apartment rental rate. craigslist.title: Clean, Safe, Afordable Home for Senior(s) in Gated Community
craigslist.full_address: wiggins rd n, Plant City, FL 33566
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE ADD BEFORE APPLYING. This is a 55+ park, so someone in your household must be at least that age. This is a non-smoker residence, so please, if you're a smoker, don't apply. Home Features: Completely rebuilt interior: floors, walls, ceiling, plumbing, wiring, cabinetry; everything! Ideal for a single person or couple on fixed income…spotlessly clean, safe, in a Gated Community, and conveniently located midway between Plant City and Lakeland with quick access to I-4 and only 6 minutes from the new BayCare hospital. Rent includes the home itself, the lot, water, sewer, trash and lawn mowing. Additionally, you should be able to connect to free Park WIFI. There's just one bedroom since the other has been converted to a utility room with the washer and dryer. The home has newer central air and heat, a carport with concrete driveway, and a new storage shed. The Park has paved roads, security lighting and high security key-locked mailboxes. It’s a small, friendly park with only 22 units. This home is on Lot 6 in Country Oaks Adult Mobile Home Park, 615 N. Wiggins Rd, Plant City. Up to two small indoor pets (under 20 pounds) OK. Renter must be able to pass a background check and provide proof of reliable income adequate to pay rent and expenses. Move-in requires first month's rent $850 plus $525 security deposit and a 6-month lease. Park rules can be found at CountryOaksAdultMHP.com. To apply, contact the resident park managers, Josh or Krissy, at the phone number shown on the sign in front of the park (SEE FIRST PICTURE IN THIS AD FOR THE NUMBER). Phone calls receive priority responses.

GIVE US A CALL!! 917 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach, FL 33572 Discover unbelievable waterfront living at Pilar’s Harbour. Dock your boat in one of our 5 boat slips or look out your double French doors and watch manatees and dolphins swimming in our saltwater canals. Either way, your Florida lifestyle living is just around the bend. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our villas include updated kitchens, gorgeous open spaces, and energy-efficient features. Our 2-bedroom/2-bathroom with separate den waterfront villas have huge patio areas, the master bathroom includes double sinks, soaker tubs with a separate enclosed shower, and a 2-car garage with every apartment. Our 2-bedroom/1-bathroom villas include 2 private covered parking spaces. Come to Riverview and Apollo Beach’s best-kept secret, Pilar’s Harbour Apartments; now is the time to Stop Looking and Start Living a waterfront lifestyle. craigslist.title: 2br/ 2bath renovated condo for rent
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post AMAZING updated 2 bedroom split plan. This rental has a newer kitchen, new appliances, and an indoor washer and dryer. This property has a wonderful balcony and storage room. The layout is perfect for anyone that desires a split plan as the bedrooms are on opposite sides of the unit for privacy. This is a must see and will not be up for rental for very long! Please contact immediately for a private showing! There is an initial criminal background and credit check required, done online with the owner, and cost $43 which is deducted from the first month's rent if approved. Then, there is a non-refundable $150 application fee per applicant done through the community. One dog under 20 pounds or one cat is allowed. There is a pet deposit of $250. NON SMOKING.

craigslist.geocode_query: 2BR/2BA with Modern Upgrades 917 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Elevate Your Living Experience: LEASE Our Newly Renovated Units!! Move-In Ready 2BR/2BA with Modern Upgrades 917 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach, FL 33572 Discover unbelievable waterfront living at Pilar’s Harbour. Dock your boat in one of our 5 boat slips or look out your double French doors and watch manatees and dolphins swimming in our saltwater canals. Either way, your Florida lifestyle living is just around the bend. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our villas include updated kitchens, gorgeous open spaces, and energy-efficient features. Our 2-bedroom/2-bathroom with separate den waterfront villas have huge patio areas, the master bathroom includes double sinks, soaker tubs with a separate enclosed shower, and a 2-car garage with every apartment. craigslist.title: Convenience location, Cute, Cozy, Fenced yard
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Renting from a private owner without extra fee like big corporation! House will be shown personally with proof of ownership! Cute house, 2 Full Bedrooms, 1 Full Bath, 1 Car Garage and a bonus sunroom! You can make it into 3 bedrooms. It is a Block Home on high ground with a new roof to sustain all the natural disasters. Make it your home to paint it at your own taste! Nice yard to make it as your own garden sanctuary! Great locations and is ideal for family or professionals looking for locations near major roads to get you where you need to go. The Beacon Squares Community has a swimming pool, civic center, and also a RV parking area for a nominal fee. Near all Shopping, Schools with Bus Stop near, Sports facilities, Golfing, hospitals, restaurants, The Tarpon Springs Sponge Docks, Clearwater Beach and many more of the Florida Best Beaches. 1st/Last/Security Required. Pets are welcome with a pet fee. Available for Move-In by August 1, 2026

Available August 1, 2026, this exceptional David Weekley-built ranch home offers an unparalleled combination of luxury, comfort, and energy efficiency in one of the area's most desirable communities served by A-rated schools. The expansive living areas flow seamlessly into a beautiful sunroom and an oversized covered lanai, providing the perfect space for entertaining, relaxing, or enjoying Florida's year-round sunshine. Built with David Weekley's renowned quality and attention to detail, this home delivers both sophistication and everyday practicality for modern families. Beyond the home itself, residents enjoy access to outstanding community amenities designed for every stage of family life. Take advantage of the resort-style swimming pools, beautifully maintained playgrounds, dedicated toddler play areas, scenic walking trails, and inviting community gathering spaces. Whether you're looking for outdoor recreation, a safe place for children to play, or a welcoming neighborhood atmosphere, this community offers it all. Conveniently located near top-rated schools, shopping, dining, parks, and major commuter routes, this home presents a rare opportunity to enjoy premium living in a highly sought-after location. Pets are welcome with applicable fees. Homes of this size, quality, and energy efficiency rarely become available for lease. With solar-powered energy savings, FREE Internet, FREE Cable TV, resort-style amenities, and access to A-rated schools, this home offers exceptional value and a lifestyle that is difficult to match. Secure your opportunity today for August 1, 2026 occupancy. craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Our beautiful apartments have quality options to make you feel at home. 917 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach, FL 33572 Discover unbelievable waterfront living at Pilar’s Harbour. Dock your boat in one of our 5 boat slips or look out your double French doors and watch manatees and dolphins swimming in our saltwater canals. Either way, your Florida lifestyle living is just around the bend. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our villas include updated kitchens, gorgeous open spaces, and energy-efficient features. Our 2-bedroom/2-bathroom with separate den waterfront villas have huge patio areas, the master bathroom includes double sinks, soaker tubs with a separate enclosed shower, and a 2-car garage with every apartment. Our 2-bedroom/1-bathroom villas include 2 private covered parking spaces. Come to Riverview and Apollo Beach’s best-kept secret, Pilar’s Harbour Apartments; now is the time to Stop Looking and Start Living a waterfront lifestyle. craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Apply Today!! Waterfront Villas Awaits 917 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach, FL 33572 Discover unbelievable waterfront living at Pilar’s Harbour. Dock your boat in one of our 5 boat slips or look out your double French doors and watch manatees and dolphins swimming in our saltwater canals. Either way, your Florida lifestyle living is just around the bend. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our villas include updated kitchens, gorgeous open spaces, and energy-efficient features. Our 2-bedroom/2-bathroom with separate den waterfront villas have huge patio areas, the master bathroom includes double sinks, soaker tubs with a separate enclosed shower, and a 2-car garage with every apartment. Our 2-bedroom/1-bathroom villas include 2 private covered parking spaces. Come to Riverview and Apollo Beach’s best-kept secret, Pilar’s Harbour Apartments; now is the time to Stop Looking and Start Living a waterfront lifestyle. Apartment Features: Modern Kitchen Granite Countertops Stainless Steel Dishwasher Extended Countertop Built-in Microwave Pantry / Storage Washer and Dryer Den / Home Office Hardwood Floors in select Villas Huge Walk-In Closets Tons of Storage Luxury Tub & Glass Enclosed Shower Double Sink Ceiling Fans Throughout Community Features: Breakfast Bar Double Sinks Granite Countertops Stainless Steel Appliances Refrigerator with Ice Maker Dishwasher Microwave Large Closet Air Conditioning In-Unit Laundry Open-Concept Spacious Floorplans Views Ceiling Fan Private Balcony Cable Ready Pet Friendly Close to Shopping Close to Restaurants Corporate Housing Available Close to Schools Online Payments Available On-Site Maintenance On-Site Management Online Service Requests Unique Villa Style Community 2 Stunning Swimming Pools Fire Pits Boat Slips Rentals Canal Access Stunning Water Views Large Private Patio Garage or Covered ParkingIncluded with each Villa Beautiful Landscaping Pet Friendly* Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://liveinsula.com/wcwamle6/pilar-s-harbour-apartments *The rental amount shown includes only the monthly apartment rental rate. Additional monthly charges may apply and will be outlined in the Lease Agreement for your review before signing. For details about any additional charges, please contact our leasing office. 🌴 Welcome to Stress-Free Living at Pilar’s Harbour 🌴Ready to simplify your life and finally enjoy it?At Pilar’s Harbour, you can leave the maintenance, yard work, and headaches behind… and step into a lifestyle designed for comfort, peace, and ease. ✨ What You’ll Love:✔️ Spacious 1 & 2 Bedroom Homes✔️ Washer & Dryer Included✔️ Beautiful Water Views Available 🌅✔️ Private Garages (select homes) 🚗✔️ Quiet, Welcoming Community✔️ Professional Maintenance Team – We Handle It All!💙 This is more than an apartment… it’s a lifestyle upgrade.Imagine mornings with coffee overlooking the water, afternoons without chores, and evenings enjoying your peaceful surroundings.📍 Pilar’s Harbour Apartments📞 Call or Text TODAY: show contact info

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Large completely remodeled 2 bedroom/1 bath apartment near downtown Dunedin. New kitchen cabinets, granite countertops and GE stainless steel appliances. Dimmer light switches in all rooms and dimmable under cabinet lighting in kitchen. New LED light fixtures throughout. Bathroom has new vanity with granite countertop, toilet, shower tiles and shower door. Apartment has ceramic tile in kitchen and dining room and LVP flooring throughout the rest of the apartment. New Central Heat/AC. Includes new GE stackable washer/dryer machine inside apartment. Kitchen has dishwasher, garbage disposal, new sink and faucet. Master bedroom includes walk-in closet and covered balcony with additional storage closet. Great location within walking distance to downtown Dunedin. Very clean and well maintained downstairs apartment. Call Bobby show contact info .

craigslist.title: Beautiful 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath single-family house
craigslist.full_address: Coral Springs Drive, Wesley Chapel, FL 33624
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This property is located at Coral Springs Drive, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544. It is situated in a beautiful community. This spacious 3,075 sq. ft. home includes 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, a large study room downstairs with tile flooring, and separate oversized family and living rooms. The downstairs features tile floors, while the upstairs is finished with laminate flooring. The home also offers a 3-car garage and a screened porch, along with an open foyer for an elegant entrance. The master bedroom includes both a hot tub and a separate shower. The kitchen is large and functional, with a breakfast nook perfect for casual dining. The property backs onto a conservation area, offering a serene and beautiful natural setting. This lovely home is in a well-maintained community with tennis and basketball courts, conveniently located near Bruce B. Downs Boulevard and County Line Road. It is close to major shopping centers such as The Shops at Wiregrass and Target, and offers easy access to I-75. Please text or call to show contact info

house_ger.name: Beautiful 4-bedroom, 2.5-bath single-family house
house_ger.msg: QR Code Link to This Post This property is located at Coral Springs Drive, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544. It is situated in a beautiful community. This spacious 3,075 sq. ft. home includes 4 bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, a large study room downstairs with tile flooring, and separate oversized family and living rooms. The downstairs features tile floors, while the upstairs is finished with laminate flooring. The home also offers a 3-car garage and a screened porch, along with an open foyer for an elegant entrance. The master bedroom includes both a hot tub and a separate shower. The kitchen is large and functional, with a breakfast nook perfect for casual dining. The property backs onto a conservation area, offering a serene and beautiful natural setting. This lovely home is in a well-maintained community with tennis and basketball courts, conveniently located near Bruce B. Downs Boulevard and County Line Road. It is close to major shopping centers such as The Shops at Wiregrass and Target, and offers easy access to I-75. Please text or call to show contact info

craigslist.title: Remodeling? Need a Temporary Housing? Our Rooms Have Full Kitchens!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Furnished Studio - Only 3 Month Minimum! Take advantage of our special discounted rate! All utilities are included! show contact info www.esa.com/craigslist Looking for a place to call home for a couple months or longer? We have everything you need without the hassles of traditional apartments, all at a great rate. Each room comes with a fully equipped kitchen and plenty of workspace. And unlike apartments, cable and Wi-Fi are already hooked up and free! With no leases and no credit checks, we are move-in ready. So just bring yourself – and your furry family member – and feel right at home. Property Amenities All Rooms Non-Smoking Pet-Friendly Rooms Available Weekly Housekeeping Included Free Healthy Breakfast On-Site Guest Laundry On-Site Fitness Facility Free Off-Street Parking In-Room Amenities Fully Equipped Kitchen Full-Size Refrigerator Electric Range Microwave Free In-Room Wi-Fi Flat Screen TVs Free Cable with Premium Channels Iron & Ironing Board Dining and workspace Staying less than 3 months? We also have great nightly, weekly, and 30-night rates. Call for details. Minimum 90-night length of stay required. Booking conditions apply. Rates and availability subject to change. Rate will vary by room type and stay dates. Rate not inclusive of taxes and fees. Actual room may vary from those shown. Pets are always welcome at Extended Stay America. A maximum of two pets are allowed in each suite. Pet fees vary by location to cover the cost of cleaning and guest room fumigation. Service animals will be exempt from this charge. Height and length restrictions apply: pets can be no longer than 36 inches and no taller than 36 inches. Larger, or more than two pets requires property manager’s approval. Please contact the property for questions. This site may contain errors, inaccuracies, omissions or incomplete data (including without limitation mistaken hotel rates or availability). Extended Stay America reserves the right to rescind any stated offer and to correct any errors, inaccuracies or omissions including after a reservation order has been submitted and whether or not the order has been confirmed and your credit card charged. Extended Stay America Premier Suites - 10623 East Bay Road, Gibsonton, FL 33534

Dock your boat in one of our 5 boat slips or look out your double French doors and watch manatees and dolphins swimming in our saltwater canals. Either way, your Florida lifestyle living is just around the bend. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our villas include updated kitchens, gorgeous open spaces, and energy-efficient features. Our 2-bedroom/2-bathroom with separate den waterfront villas have huge patio areas, the master bathroom includes double sinks, soaker tubs with a separate enclosed shower, and a 2-car garage with every apartment. Our 2-bedroom/1-bathroom villas include 2 private covered parking spaces. Come to Riverview and Apollo Beach’s best-kept secret, Pilar’s Harbour Apartments; now is the time to Stop Looking and Start Living a waterfront lifestyle. craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Sunset Views Daily – Elegant Villas on the Water 917 Apollo Beach Blvd, Apollo Beach, FL 33572 Discover unbelievable waterfront living at Pilar’s Harbour. Dock your boat in one of our 5 boat slips or look out your double French doors and watch manatees and dolphins swimming in our saltwater canals. Either way, your Florida lifestyle living is just around the bend. Pilar's Harbour will meet all your expectations and is conveniently located in breathtaking beach areas, just minutes from Brandon Town Center shopping, Riverview, Sun City Center, and amazing restaurants. Our villas include updated kitchens, gorgeous open spaces, and energy-efficient features. Our 2-bedroom/2-bathroom with separate den waterfront villas have huge patio areas, the master bathroom includes double sinks, soaker tubs with a separate enclosed shower, and a 2-car garage with every apartment. Our 2-bedroom/1-bathroom villas include 2 private covered parking spaces. Come to Riverview and Apollo Beach’s best-kept secret, Pilar’s Harbour Apartments; now is the time to Stop Looking and Start Living a waterfront lifestyle. craigslist.title: Furnished 1 bedroom, efficiency Apartment
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Tired of roomates? FURNISHED, PRIVATE - COZY, Mother-in-law apartment-500 sq ft. Private entrance, natural refinished wood floors and high ceilings, 1 furnished bedroom/livingroom (brand new queen bed), 1 bath, kitchen w/dinette, screened porch. a/c -heat unit, ceiling fans, convenient access to downtown and USF (Tampa-Hampton Terrace). Nice, quiet, neighborhood. $1380 per month. Rent includes some utilities: (water, sewer and garbage-COVERED in monthly rent payment). Renter pays own electric (separate Meter). Laundry mat nearby. Bus Line, grocery, and gas within walking distance. Nice duck pond nearby for enjoyable walks. Street parking. Non-smokers only. NO pets. Terms: First and last month's rent, plus $600 security deposit. Must lease for at least 12 months. Background checks-references required, for SOLO applicant. Applicants must have a verifiable source of income.

craigslist.title: Great long-term home. Great location!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Ready for move-in. Studio/Efficiency/Room for rent with private entrance, and private bathroom, in the heart of the Grand Central District. Only about a block from shops, restaurants, and even FREE public trolley transportation into downtown St. Pete and avoid parking there. Still in a nice quiet residential area. Partially furnished with a nice bed frame, and already includes microwave and small fridge. There is No normal full size kitchen. This is a small studio efficiency, so just one small main room. But still... Your own private place with No roommates at an Unbelievable price. Utilities are a flat rate per month, including high speed WiFi, electricity, gas, water, sewer, and trash removal. Just move in without paying deposits to connect expensive monthly utilities. Please submit your application today, and hopefully move in within a few days. ----------------------------------- Qualifications: 600 Credit score or higher Proof of income 2.5 times the Rent No evictions past 5 years Pets are approved on a case-by-case basis (no aggressive breeds) Application fee per adult (may be applied to the first month's rent) Absolutely No smoking. Absolutely No drugs. Ready for move-in today.
